zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Danielston於1379年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，她的父親Robert de Danielston28歲，母親Margaret Montifichet34歲。她於1400年之前與Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1409年7月之前在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Danielston于1379年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，她的父亲Robert de Danielston28岁，母亲Margaret Montifichet34岁。她于1400年之前与Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1409年7月之前在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Danielston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Mauritz, Nels, Nils, Sigfrid, Alf, Arlys, Berent, Bjorn, Eskil, Gunner.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Danielsson: patronymic from the personal name Daniel .
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Danielsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Daniel
meanings: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Romanian, Jewish, Assyrian/Chaldean, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania); Breton (rarely Le Daniel); Hungarian (Dániel): from the Biblical personal name Daniel, Syriac (Assyrian/Chaldean) Dānīʾēl, Hungarian Dániel (from Hebrew Daniyyel ‘God is my judge’), borne by a major prophet in the Bible. The chief factor influencing the popularity of the personal name (and hence the frequency of the surname) was undoubtedly the dramatic story in the Book of Daniel recounting the prophet's steadfast adherence to his religious faith despite pressure and persecution from the Mesopotamian kings in whose court he served: Nebuchadnezzar, Belshazzar, and Darius. The name was also borne by a 2nd-century Christian martyr and by a 9th-century hermit, the legend of whose lives were popular among Christians during the Middle Ages. Among Orthodox Christians in Eastern Europe the name was also popular as being that of a 4th-century Persian martyr, who was venerated in the Orthodox Church. In France, this surname is most common in Brittany.

Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of McDaniel , which is actually a variant of McDonnell , from the Gaelic form of Irish Donal (equivalent to Scottish Donald), erroneously associated with the Biblical personal name Daniel. See also O'Donnell .
Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Danijel: from the Biblical personal name Danijel ‘Daniel’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Danielston was born in 1379, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Danielston, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Montifichet, was 34. She married Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs before 1400. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died before July 1409, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Danielston est née en 1379, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Danielston, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Montifichet, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs avant 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée avant juillet 1409, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Danielston 1379 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Danielston 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Montifichet 34. Sie hat vor 1400 Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb vor Juli 1409 in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Danielston è nata il nel 1379 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Danielston, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Montifichet, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs prima del 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del luglio 1409, nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Danielston(이)가 1379년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Danielston(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Montifichet(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1400년 이전 Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 이전 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 사망했다.
